label: Guides
description: Practical buyer-defense guides for reading SEO work, proposals, audits, and recurring reports.

label: Technical SEO
description: Crawlability, canonicals, sitemaps, rendering, and deployment details that survive contact with real sites.

label: Local SEO
description: Local visibility and location-signal guidance that stays grounded in verifiable setup and maintenance work.

label: Provider Reviews
description: Evidence-first reviews of SEO providers, deliverable claims, and buyer-facing promises.

label: Audit Reviews
description: Reviews of SEO audit quality, scope, proof, and the difference between signal and performance theater.

label: Pricing
description: Pricing transparency, buying models, and the questions that matter before a contract gets signed.

label: Dictionary
description: Short, technical definitions for SEO terms that are often used loosely or explained badly.

label: Templates
description: Editorial templates and publishing scaffolds used to keep future work consistent and reviewable.

label: Checklists
description: Checklists for repeatable reviews, launches, audits, and verification steps.

label: Bad SEO Patterns
description: Named patterns that create buyer confusion, reporting fog, or technical damage without proving value.

label: Experiments
description: Public test logs with hypotheses, changes, limits, and notes about what the result does not prove.

label: Research
description: Longer research notes and source-backed observations that do not fit a shorter guide or dictionary format.

label: Methodology
description: Editorial rules, citation standards, review rules, and corrections policy for the publication.
